teamObjective.explanation: Deterministically repaired ToM trace with objective finish_hand.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner (player 2, 3 cards) is likely trying to win the trick cheaply if possible, then lead back to help me shed my remaining card. With no public plays, partner probably has a mix of ranks around 7/8+ and possibly some trumps, but this is uncertain.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponents (players 1 and 3, 3 cards each) are trying to win control and prevent my team from going out first. They may hold trumps or higher singles, especially because no cards have been played yet. I should avoid feeding them a free high card.

actionRationale.primaryReason: Selected play-single-spade-2-copy2 after deterministic schema repair of ToM reasoning.

whyNotAlternatives.reason: Legal alternative retained for verifier comparison after schema repair.

risks: Schema repair may preserve imperfect reasoning from the raw model output.
riskAssessment.mitigation: Treat the repaired trace as schema-normalized reasoning; do not add hidden-card facts beyond the raw output.

notes: Deterministically schema-repaired from a ToM-prompted raw output; selectedActionId is unchanged.
